chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text: To maintain disabled person parking privileges after relocation, a person who relocates to Oregon and who holds a disabled person parking permit from another state shall obtain an Oregon disabled person parking permit pursuant to ORS 811.602 (Disabled person parking permit) . [2001 c.367 §6]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.612 — Maintenance of privileges after relocation

To maintain disabled person parking privileges after relocation, a person who relocates to Oregon and who holds a disabled person parking permit from another state shall obtain an Oregon disabled person parking permit pursuant to ORS 811.602 (Disabled person parking permit) . [2001 c.367 §6]

subsections.text: To maintain disabled person parking privileges after relocation, a person who relocates to Oregon and who holds a disabled person parking permit from another state shall obtain an Oregon disabled person parking permit pursuant to ORS 811.602 (Disabled person parking permit) . [2001 c.367 §6]
